title: UsHousePtrTransactionDetailsV1
description:
`details` payload of one US House PTR transaction record (regime doc §5).
Optional fields serialize as explicit nulls so the contract surface is
fully visible in every candidate (fixtures `MANIFEST.json` convention).

amount_band_raw.description: Amount band string verbatim as filed.

asset_type_code.description: Trailing `[XX]` asset-type code from the asset cell (legend E2).

cap_gains_over_200.description: Cap. Gains > $200 checkbox; null = indeterminate from the text layer.

doc_id.description: Clerk `DocID` of the filing (opaque string; also on the PDF as `Filing ID #`).

filing_status_raw.description: Per-row filing status verbatim (`New`/`Amended`, regime doc §3.7).

partial_sale.description: True only for the `S (partial)` token (regime doc §3.4).

row_id.description: eFD transaction id — printed only on amended rows (amendment linkage key).

row_ordinal.description: 1-based row position across the whole document.

vehicle_location.description: `LOCATION:` sub-line of the matching Investment Vehicle bullet.

vehicle_owner_code.description: `(Owner: XX)` code of the matching Investment Vehicle bullet.

OwnerSource.description: Provenance of the Gold `owner` mapping (regime doc §3.3 auditability).

oneOf.description: Owner code printed in the row's own Owner column.
Inherited from the matching Investment Vehicle bullet's `(Owner: XX)`.

Blank owner column and no vehicle owner: filer's own asset (flagged
assumption, regime doc §3.3 — raw stays null in Silver).
